377 GG0170RR3_TYPE_OF_WLCHR_END_CD GG0170RR3_TYPE_OF_WLCHR_END_CD GG0170RR3 Indicate type of wheelchair or scooter (Dschg) - The data in this column indicate the type of wheelchair or scooter used by the patient used in wheeling 50 feet with two turns at the time of discharge. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicate the type of wheelchair or scooter
